author: missirol
body:
backport of #10503

This integrates the update in https://github.com/cms-data/L1TriggerScouting-OnlineProcessing/pull/1 into 16_0_X.

It goes along with the update in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50792 (though the latter does not strictly depend on this PR, because the cms-data file in question is not tested centrally at the moment).
title: Update tag for L1TriggerScouting-OnlineProcessing to V00-01-00 [`16_0_X`]
